note: Eval-attestation receipt composer (POSTCAMPAIGN-BAND-SPEC.md §PC-6, EVAL-AT-1). Vector 1: eval_log hash + mandate_reference both bound, exercises claim_strength: mandate-bound. Vector 2: eval_log hash only, no mandate_reference, exercises claim_strength: hash-only. Vector 3: empty policy_parameters, exercises attestation_determination: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE + claim_strength: missing finite gate.

vectors.name: mandate_bound
vectors.description: Eval log hash present and referenced by a compiled Work Mandate digest.

output_payload.verify_instructions: Recompute SHA-256 of the referenced inspect_ai_eval_log eval log bytes and confirm it equals sha256:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa; this receipt is VERIFY-ONLY and does not re-run, re-score, or grade the eval.

not_proven.detail: This receipt attests only that a specific eval log digest was produced; it does not re-run, re-score, or otherwise validate the underlying evaluation.
The hash covers exactly the log bytes supplied by the caller. A truncated, redacted, or cherry-picked log hashes correctly too.
mandate_reference records a pointer to a compiled Work Mandate (art-274); whether the eval actually satisfies that mandate's policy conditions is a separate judgment, not made by this kernel.
A §16 signature attests the artifact at generated_at; a §20 anchor (if attached) proves inclusion by a time. Neither proves the eval log is still current.

vectors.name: hash_only
vectors.description: Eval log hash present, no mandate_reference bound.

output_payload.verify_instructions: Recompute SHA-256 of the referenced inspect_ai_eval_log eval log bytes and confirm it equals sha256:aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa; this receipt is VERIFY-ONLY and does not re-run, re-score, or grade the eval.

not_proven.detail: This receipt attests only that a specific eval log digest was produced; it does not re-run, re-score, or otherwise validate the underlying evaluation.
The hash covers exactly the log bytes supplied by the caller. A truncated, redacted, or cherry-picked log hashes correctly too.
mandate_reference records a pointer to a compiled Work Mandate (art-274); whether the eval actually satisfies that mandate's policy conditions is a separate judgment, not made by this kernel.
A §16 signature attests the artifact at generated_at; a §20 anchor (if attached) proves inclusion by a time. Neither proves the eval log is still current.

vectors.name: insufficient_evidence_edge_case
vectors.description: No eval_log supplied -- attestation_determination: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE, claim_strength: missing, not a crash (finite gate).

not_proven.detail: This receipt attests only that a specific eval log digest was produced; it does not re-run, re-score, or otherwise validate the underlying evaluation.
The hash covers exactly the log bytes supplied by the caller. A truncated, redacted, or cherry-picked log hashes correctly too.
mandate_reference records a pointer to a compiled Work Mandate (art-274); whether the eval actually satisfies that mandate's policy conditions is a separate judgment, not made by this kernel.
A §16 signature attests the artifact at generated_at; a §20 anchor (if attached) proves inclusion by a time. Neither proves the eval log is still current.
